summary: I rewrote the business requirements artifact at `.pipeliner/phases/01-define/main/requirements-writer/output/requirements.md` (no prior copy existed in this worktree), producing 18 atomic, non-technical "When X, Y" requirements that resolve all six critic findings: R1–R2 now enumerate both surfaces — full summary above the per-step cards on the pipeline detail page and a compact live cell on the pipeline list, with neither allowed to go stale (F1, F5); R10–R12 cover not-started, paused/canceled, and a catch-all guaranteeing every possible state maps to a truthful plain-language summary (F2); R5–R6 replace the untestable "fairly reflects" with a concrete rule — name steps when two or fewer are active, show a phase-plus-count otherwise (F3); R14 restates live updating in observable terms — pushed to every open page as a consequence of the state-changing event, within a few seconds, with R15–R16 covering page-load truth and out-of-order events (F4); and R4 adopts the recorded default of showing the iteration number only from the second attempt onward (F6).
